utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. Checking the final package: (1) destination: fully specified as Lisbon, Portugal; (2) travel_dates: fully specified with clear start and end dates; (3) transportation: includes full flight details with cost and airline; (4) accommodation: includes hotel name, type, price, total cost, and amenities; (5) activities: includes a detailed list of activities with total cost and currency; (6) additional_services: includes dining details with cost, insurance, and booking reference; (7) total_budget: includes total cost, currency, and budget remaining. All 7 items are included and fully detailed according to the required format.
